import Link from 'next/link'; export default function Hero() { return (

AI-Powered Software Development

Autonomous development workflows that plan, build, test, review, and document — from GitHub issue to production-ready pull request.

Book a Discovery Call View Services
); }

import type { Metadata } from 'next'; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: 'About', }; export default function About() { return (

About

I build autonomous software development systems. My flagship project, the AI Developer Workflow (ADW), turns GitHub issues into production-ready pull requests — planning, coding, testing, reviewing, and documenting without manual intervention.

ADW is built on a modular TypeScript architecture with composable workflow phases. Each phase — planning, building, testing, reviewing, documenting — is an independent agent that can run alone or be orchestrated into complete SDLC pipelines.

Philosophy

Software development has predictable patterns. Issue triage, branch creation, implementation planning, test writing, code review, and documentation follow repeatable workflows. By encoding these patterns into AI agents, I eliminate the mechanical overhead and let developers focus on architecture and product decisions.

Open Source

The core ADW system is developed in the open at{' '} github.com/paysdoc . I believe that the tools shaping how we write software should be transparent and community-driven.

); }

tool_input.description: Build the portfolio site as static export

tool_input.content:
# Permanent Webhook URL + Portfolio Site at paysdoc.nl

## Context

The ADW webhook server currently requires ngrok for a public URL, which resets on every restart — forcing manual webhook reconfiguration in every GitHub repository. Simultaneously, a professional portfolio site is needed to advertise AI-powered development services. The domain `paysdoc.nl` has been registered.

**Architecture:** Cloudflare Tunnel (webhook) + Cloudflare Pages (portfolio) + Next.js static export + Cal.com booking

---

## Completed Work

### Webhook Signature Validation (Part 2 — done)

- [x] **Created `adws/triggers/webhookSignature.ts`** — HMAC-SHA256 validation module using `node:crypto` with `timingSafeEqual` for constant-time comparison. Validates `x-hub-signature-256` header against raw body bytes.
- [x] **Modified `adws/triggers/trigger_webhook.ts`** — Extracts `rawBody = Buffer.concat(chunks)` before JSON parsing, passes to signature validator. Returns 401 if `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` is set and validation fails. Skips validation when secret is not configured (backward compat). Logs warning on startup when secret is missing.
- [x] **Port stability for tunnel mode** — In `resolveWebhookPort()`: if `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` is set and port 8001 is unavailable, throws a hard error instead of falling back to a random port (which would silently break the Cloudflare tunnel).
- [x] **Created `adws/__tests__/webhookSignature.test.ts`** — 7 tests covering: valid signature, missing header, empty header, wrong secret, tampered payload, wrong-length signature, malformed signature. All pass.
- [x] **Fixed README discrepancy** — `adws/README.md` documented endpoint as `/gh-webhook` but actual code uses `/webhook`. Corrected to `/webhook`, updated payload URL example, updated event list to include PR events, updated security section.
- [x] All existing webhook tests still pass (22 tests in webhookHandlers + webhookClearComment).
- [x] TypeScript type check passes cleanly.

### Portfolio Site Scaffolding (Part 3 — partially done)

- [x] **Created GitHub repo** `paysdoc/paysdoc.nl` (public) at https://github.com/paysdoc/paysdoc.nl
- [x] **Scaffolded Next.js app** with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, App Router, `src/` directory
- [x] **Configured `next.config.ts`** for Cloudflare Pages static export: `output: 'export'`, `images: { unoptimized: true }`
- [x] **Created components:**
  - `src/components/Navbar.tsx` — Sticky nav with active-link highlighting
  - `src/components/Footer.tsx` — Copyright + GitHub/Contact links
  - `src/components/Hero.tsx` — Hero section with CTAs
  - `src/components/SkillCard.tsx` — Skill grid card component
  - `src/components/ServiceCard.tsx` — Service offering card with feature list
  - `src/components/CalEmbed.tsx` — Cal.com iframe embed (client component)
- [x] **Created pages:**
  - `src/app/layout.tsx` — Root layout with Navbar, Footer, metadata, Geist fonts
  - `src/app/page.tsx` — Home page with Hero + 6-item skills grid
  - `src/app/about/page.tsx` — Background, philosophy, open-source section
  - `src/app/services/page.tsx` — 3 service cards + CTA
  - `src/app/contact/page.tsx` — Cal.com embed + email/GitHub links
- [x] **Updated `globals.css`** with CSS custom properties for theming (light/dark)

---

## Remaining Work

### Portfolio Site — Finalize (Part 3)

- [ ] **Build and verify static export** — Run `npx next build` in `paysdoc.nl/` repo, verify `out/` directory is generated
- [ ] **Clean up scaffold files** — Remove default `public/next.svg`, `public/vercel.svg`, etc.
- [ ] **Initial commit and push** — Commit all portfolio files and push to `paysdoc/paysdoc.nl` main branch
- [ ] **Cal.com account setup** — Sign up at cal.com (free tier), create "Discovery Call" event type, update `calLink` in `CalEmbed` if slug differs from `paysdoc/discovery-call`

### Cloudflare Setup (Part 1 — manual)

- [ ] **Add paysdoc.nl to Cloudflare** — Sign up (free plan), add site, update nameservers at registrar
- [ ] **Authenticate cloudflared** — `cloudflared tunnel login`, select `paysdoc.nl` zone
- [ ] **Create named tunnel** — `cloudflared tunnel create adw-webhook`
- [ ] **Route DNS** — `cloudflared tunnel route dns adw-webhook api.paysdoc.nl`
- [ ] **Create tunnel config** at `~/.cloudflared/config.yml`:
  ```yaml
  tunnel: <TUNNEL_UUID>
  credentials-file: /Users/martin/.cloudflared/<TUNNEL_UUID>.json

  ingress:
    - hostname: api.paysdoc.nl
      service: http://localhost:8001
    - service: http_status:404
  ```
- [ ] **Test tunnel** — `cloudflared tunnel run adw-webhook`, then `curl https://api.paysdoc.nl/health`
- [ ] **Install as launchd service** — `cloudflared service install` (user-level, no sudo)
- [ ] **Add www redirect** — Cloudflare Dashboard > Rules > Redirect Rules: `www.paysdoc.nl` → `https://paysdoc.nl${path}` (301)

### Deploy Portfolio to Cloudflare Pages (Part 3e)

- [ ] **Connect repo** — Cloudflare Dashboard > Pages > Connect to Git > select `paysdoc/paysdoc.nl`
- [ ] **Configure build** — Build command: `npx next build`, output dir: `out`
- [ ] **Add custom domain** — `paysdoc.nl` pointed at Pages deployment
- [ ] Auto-deploys on push to `main`

### Generate Webhook Secret & Update .env (Part 2e)

- [ ] **Generate secret** — `openssl rand -hex 32`
- [ ] **Add to `.env`** — Set `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET=<generated>`

### GitHub Webhook Migration (Part 4)

- [ ] **Migrate all repos** to use permanent URL with signature validation:
  ```bash
  WEBHOOK_URL="https://api.paysdoc.nl/webhook"
  WEBHOOK_SECRET="<generated>"
  REPOS=("paysdoc/AI_Dev_Workflow" "paysdoc/Millennium" "paysdoc/vestmatic" ...)

  for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do
    # Create or update webhook with URL, secret, and events:
    # issues, issue_comment, pull_request, pull_request_review, pull_request_review_comment
  done
  ```
- [ ] **Verify with ping** — `gh api repos/$repo/hooks/$id/pings --method POST` for each repo

### DNS Architecture

| Record | Name | Target | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|---------|
| CNAME | `paysdoc.nl` | `*.pages.dev` | Portfolio site |
| CNAME | `www` | `paysdoc.nl` | Redirect to root |
| CNAME | `api` | `<TUNNEL_UUID>.cfargotunnel.com` | Webhook tunnel |

---

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] `curl https://api.paysdoc.nl/health` returns healthy JSON
- [ ] Create a test issue on a configured repo → webhook fires, ADW processes it
- [ ] Send a request with wrong/missing signature → returns 401
- [ ] `https://paysdoc.nl` loads the portfolio site
- [ ] Cal.com booking widget renders on the contact page
- [ ] `https://www.paysdoc.nl` redirects to `https://paysdoc.nl`

---

## Costs

Everything on free tiers:
- Cloudflare (DNS + Tunnel + Pages): **free**
- Cal.com (1 event type): **free**
- Domain renewal (paysdoc.nl): existing cost
